description:
Offered: Spring
This course will introduce research methods in cognitive psychology, the scientific study of how people perceive, learn, remember, and think. Students will complete simulations of experiments, analyze the data, interpret the results, and write lab reports.
Prerequisite(s): PSY 2040 or PSY 2000 or by permission of instructor
Pre/Concurrent: PSY 3550
prerequisites: PSY 2040 or PSY 2000 or by permission of instructor
